name: async-e2e-test-fixtures
description: E2E test fixtures for tmux+worktree+agent: tmp_repo creates git repo with --initial-branch=main, store creates SQLite DB with migrate(), pool wires TmuxManager+WorktreeManager+Store

name: async-agent-pool-methods
description: AgentPool methods are async: spawn(), send_task(), check_status(), collect_result(), release(), cleanup() - must be awaited in tests
